response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience, but the role requires 8 years of C++, 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems, and cloud compute platform leadership. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no demonstrated experience leading cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at the required scale. Core technical requirements are not met.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across many domains
Founder/lead experience on GISCollective with Kubernetes deployment
Active mentoring/teaching via workshops, courses, and code katas
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience — only one short C/C++ role
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed systems leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Missing cloud compute platform / distributed systems scale
